reviews.comment:
Agua para mate gratis. Baños impecables, duchas. Buena provision en almacen. Estacionamiento amplio, aire para cubiertas y placita con cesped para niños

(Translated by Google)
Free hot water for mate. Spotless bathrooms and showers. Well-stocked store. Ample parking, air conditioning for tires, and a small grassy playground for children.

reviews.comment:
La limpieza de los baños y el local es excelente.
Ayer fui a pedir un croisant (el mas caro que compre nunca) pero mas allá de eso yo elijo comprarlo. El tema es que estaba congelado  y pagar algo caro y que no este en condiciones de comer es un bajon. Al menos si me decian pedia que lo calienten

(Translated by Google)
The cleanliness of the restrooms and the place itself is excellent.
Yesterday I went to order a croissant (the most expensive one I've ever bought), but beyond that, I choose to buy it. The problem is that it was frozen, and paying for something expensive that's inedible is a real bummer. At least if they had told me, I would have asked them to heat it up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxOVBPWTlBRRAB
